services.heading: Services
services.intro: I build digital products focused on product, UX and measurable results.
services.web.title: Web Development
services.web.description: Design and development of modern, fast and scalable web applications tailored to concrete business goals.
services.web.includes.backend: Backend with Node and REST APIs
services.ui.title: Frontend & User Experience
services.ui.description: I build clear, accessible and optimized interfaces, balancing aesthetics, usability and performance.
services.maintenance.title: Optimization & Maintenance
services.maintenance.description: I improve existing projects to run better, load faster and be easier to maintain.
projects.heading: Work
projects.intro: A curated selection of projects showcasing web development and content work.
projects.1.title: Landing Page Roma: Massages & Reiki
projects.1.description: Website for Roma Massages & Reiki, a space focused on wellbeing and relaxation.
projects.1.details.name: Roma – Massages & Reiki
projects.1.details.client: Client: Independent therapeutic massage and reiki business
projects.1.details.context: The client needed a professional online presence to offer their services. Until then, communication with potential clients was informal and there was no website conveying trust, clarity or professionalism.
projects.1.details.objective: Design and develop a clear, sober and accessible website:
projects.1.details.objective.items: Present services in an organized way
projects.1.details.process: The work was approached comprehensively, prioritizing simplicity, visual clarity and ease of use.
projects.1.details.process.steps: Defined the site structure and hierarchy
Designed a minimalist visual experience aligned with wellbeing
Developed the frontend with a responsive, mobile-first approach
projects.1.details.result: The site was successfully deployed and became the main channel to present the service.
projects.1.details.result.items: Clear professional image in front of new clients
Direct contact channel through the site
Digital presence aligned with the brand identity
projects.1.details.responsibilities: Deployment and final delivery to the client
projects.1.details.technologies: Responsive Design — correct display on all devices
Netlify — fast, reliable deployment for institutional sites
projects.1.details.feedback: The client highlighted clarity in presenting services, a professional and harmonious aesthetic, and ease of sharing the site. The project achieved its goal of becoming a working tool, not just an informative page.
projects.2.title: Practical REST API with JS
projects.2.description: REST API built with plain JavaScript for resource management
projects.2.details.name: Practical REST API (JS)
projects.2.details.summary: REST API built with JavaScript and Node.js for resource management
projects.2.details.context: In modern web development, REST APIs are the backbone for backends and distributed applications. This project was created as a practical implementation of a REST API that manages resources consistently with HTTP conventions.
projects.2.details.objective: Develop a functional REST API that allows:
projects.2.details.process: Development focused on backend best practices with Node.js and Express:
projects.2.details.process.steps: Set up a basic Express server
Defined RESTful routes according to resource logic
Implemented HTTP method handlers (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)
Added basic validations and error handling
Prepared simple documentation for API usage
projects.2.details.result: The API was developed and deployed successfully and works as expected.
projects.2.details.result.items: Stable operation for consumption from frontends
projects.2.details.responsibilities: Server setup with Node.js and Express
projects.2.details.technologies: Node.js — JavaScript runtime for the server
Express — web framework for routes and middleware
HTTP — standardized methods and status codes
GH Pages (demo) — hosting docs and examples
projects.2.details.feedback: This project is useful to validate core backend concepts and to provide a solid base for future integrations.
projects.3.title: Travel Landing Page
projects.3.description: Responsive landing page for a travel site built with Tailwind CSS
projects.3.details.name: Travel Landing Tailwind
projects.3.details.summary: Responsive landing page for a travel site built with Tailwind CSS
projects.3.details.context: This project was developed as a practice focused on visual design and responsive layout using Tailwind CSS. The main idea was to strengthen the ability to translate designs into real code.
projects.3.details.objective.items: Displays correctly on devices of various sizes
Uses Tailwind utilities coherently and scalably
projects.3.details.process: The project was tackled with attention to visual detail and code consistency:
projects.3.details.process.steps: Configured Tailwind CSS from scratch for the project
Designed main sections: hero, services, gallery, testimonials, footer
Applied Tailwind utilities for spacing, typography, colors and layout
Ensured readability and aesthetics on mobile, tablet and desktop
Organized classes and components to keep a consistent design
projects.3.details.result: The landing was deployed successfully and works responsively across devices.
projects.3.details.result.items: Clear implementation of Tailwind CSS utilities
projects.3.details.technologies: Tailwind CSS — design and layout utilities
Responsive Design — adaptation to various screen sizes
GitHub Pages — quick and accessible deployment
projects.3.details.feedback: This project demonstrates the ability to implement complex UI designs with a productive and maintainable approach.
projects.4.title: Stardew Valley Gifts Calendar
projects.4.description: Website dedicated to gift preferences in Stardew Valley with localStorage support.
projects.4.details.name: Stardew Valley – Interactive Calendar
projects.4.details.summary: Web application for planning events and crops
projects.4.details.context: Stardew Valley is a game that requires seasonal planning since crops, events and activities change depending on the day and season.
projects.4.details.objective.items: Clearly represents the Stardew Valley calendar
Allows navigation between seasons and days
Shows events associated with each date
Is intuitive and easy to use
Works correctly on desktop and mobile devices
projects.4.details.process: Development focused on calendar logic and user interaction.
projects.4.details.process.steps: Modeled the data structure for seasons, days and events
Designed a simple, clear UI inspired by the game's aesthetic
Ensured a responsive and smooth experience
projects.4.details.result: The project was successfully deployed and functions as an interactive reference tool.
projects.4.details.result.items: Clear navigation between seasons and days
projects.4.details.technologies: JavaScript — calendar logic, event handling and dynamic rendering
Responsive Design — adaptation to different screen sizes
projects.4.details.feedback: The project was well received by players for its usefulness in planning in-game activities, the clarity of the calendar and ease of use.
projects.5.title: Brand Design & Content Strategy
projects.5.description: Full brand identity and content strategy to increase visibility and engagement.
projects.6.title: Personal Web Development Portfolio
projects.6.description: Personal portfolio combining web development and design skills using Astro and Tailwind CSS.
projects.6.details.name: Personal Portfolio (Previous Version)
projects.6.details.summary: First web portfolio as a frontend developer
projects.6.details.context: This portfolio was my first personal site as a web developer, created to start showcasing frontend skills and to have a basic online presence.
projects.6.details.objective.items: Provides practice for layout and styles
Serves as a starting point for a professional profile
projects.6.details.process: Development focused on applying core frontend fundamentals:
projects.6.details.process.steps: Deploying the site to make it publicly accessible
projects.6.details.result: The site was deployed successfully and served as the first functional portfolio.
projects.6.details.result.items: Initial approach to design and professional presentation
Starting point for evolving to a modern stack
projects.6.details.feedback: This project helped solidify frontend fundamentals and served as the basis to adopt more modern tools and architectures.
testimonials.heading: What clients say
testimonials.intro: Proud to have worked with amazing clients. Here’s what they say.
testimonials.0.quote: I highlight Cintia's professionalism and attention to detail. She met deadlines, communicated clearly and was always available to resolve doubts. It's a pleasure to work with her.
testimonials.0.author: Diego Romero
testimonials.1.quote: Cintia immediately understood what we needed. She delivered a modern, clear and easy-to-use website. The result delighted us and our clients noticed it right away.
testimonials.1.author: Mariana
testimonials.2.quote: The site and digital identity Cintia built for Roma helped us a lot. Now people understand better what we offer and we receive more inquiries.
testimonials.2.author: Romina
testimonials.3.quote: More than a developer, Cintia was an ally. She created an attractive website and helped us understand how to use it to attract more customers. Highly recommended.
testimonials.3.author: Carlos Méndez
testimonials.4.quote: Working with Cintia was a very close experience. She understood the essence of my project and translated it authentically to the digital environment. The result was a clear, coherent space people connect with.
testimonials.4.author: Ranchesca
about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am a Frontend Developer focused on building functional, clear, and scalable digital products. I work mainly with JavaScript, TypeScript, React, and Next.js, applying best development practices, maintainable structure, and strong attention to user experience.
about.p2: I have experience integrating APIs, building reusable UI components, and collaborating through Git-based workflows.
about.p3: My background in design allows me to approach product development beyond the code, with attention to performance, visual consistency, and accessibility standards. I am looking for an opportunity in the tech industry, ideally in a remote environment, where I can grow within a team and contribute from day one.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. Here we explain how we collect, use and protect your personal data when you visit our website.

privacy.point2: We only collect data necessary to respond to inquiries or improve the service.
privacy.point3: You can request deletion of your data at any time.
